posts.title: Understanding ISO 27001: The Future of Information Security
posts.content: In an increasingly interconnected and data-driven world, the protection of sensitive information is paramount. ISO 27001 stands as a beacon of excellence in safeguarding data, ensuring privacy, and mitigating security risks...
posts.author: Krutika Sawant

posts.title: Why SOC 2 Matters for Service Organizations
posts.content: Service organizations handling client data must demonstrate their commitment to protecting information. SOC 2 reporting is the gold standard for verifying security controls...
posts.author: Vijaya Kamath
